name: House Tharashk Heir

items.name: Tool Proficiencies:
items.entry: Choose one kind of {@item Gaming Set|XPHB}

items.name: Equipment:
items.entry: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Gaming Set|XPHB} (same as above), {@item Climber's Kit|XPHB}, {@item Fine Clothes|XPHB}, {@item Hunting Trap|XPHB}, {@item Manacles|XPHB}, 2 GP; or (B) 50 GP

fluff: Heirs of other houses lead lives of luxury, but in House Tharashk you learned self-reliance from an early age. What your young house lacks in resources, it makes up for in spirit and determination. Tharashk has a destiny to fulfill, and you have a part in it. Whether in combat or in social interaction, you have learned to play the role of the hunter: study your enemies, exploit their weaknesses, and do whatever it takes to achieve victory.
